title: senecio molleri
intro: Senecio molleri, also known as Moller's ragwort, is a shrubby perennial plant native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Senecio molleri include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
